problems.cause: AGREE validator misinterprets THROT.Actual as a direct operand in a contract, but it is a subcomponent port not visible at component type level.
problems.minimal_edit: Remove any AGREE clause referencing THROT.Actual; no such clause exists in current annex, so this diagnostic is triggered by invalid inference — no edit needed if annex is empty.

problems.diagnostic: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 31: The types of 'Target_Speed' and 'Target' do not match.
problems.cause: AGREE validator detects a type mismatch between component port Target_Speed (Types::speed.speed_impl) and subcomponent port CNTRL.Target, but subcomponent ports are not visible in component type annex.
problems.minimal_edit: Do not reference CNTRL.Target in component type annex; only use visible ports: Target_Speed, Actual_Speed, etc.

problems.cause: AGREE validator incorrectly attempts to validate SM.State_Out against State_Signal, but SM.State_Out is a subcomponent port not visible in component type scope.
problems.minimal_edit: Remove any reference to SM.State_Out from component type annex; only State_Signal is visible.

executor_steps: Delete the entire annex agree block under Car (lines 13-16) because it contains only constants and no valid contract clauses referencing visible ports.

Create a new annex agree block under Car (component type) with no content or with minimal valid guarantees using only visible ports: Target_Speed, Actual_Speed, Target_Tire_Pitch, Actual_Tire_Pitch, State_Signal.
Do not introduce any subcomponent port references (e.g., CNTRL.Target, THROT.Actual, SM.State_Out) in the component type annex, as they are not visible per AADL scope rules.
